audit_result.proof_trace: publish_column_sidecars() publishes data columns to all computed subnets without validating against the node's sampling_subnets. The subnet is derived from column index (L525) and published directly (L529) with no check that subnet ∈ network_globals.sampling_subnets, violating PeerDAS custody requirements.
audit_result.attack_scenario: A block producer publishes all 128 data columns. The node publishes to all 128 subnets even though it's only subscribed to ~8 custody subnets, violating the PeerDAS spec and enabling network pollution/DOS through unsubscribed subnet publishing.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-036.text: Publishing data columns must only occur on subnets the node is subscribed to (custody/sampling).
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-036.assertion: forall col: published(col, subnet) => subscribed(subnet, custody) || subscribed(subnet, sampling)
